signup.otpInstruction: Enter the OTP sent to your email address

forgotPassword.step2Subtitle: Enter the OTP sent to your email.
forgotPassword.step3Subtitle: Set a new password for your account.
forgotPassword.successBody: Your password has been changed. You can now log in with your new password.

earnSuccess.heading: Points Earned!
earnSuccess.subheading: Congratulations! Points have been added to your account.

consent.checkboxLabel: I have read and agree to the
consent.privacyBody:
• We collect your name, phone, email, and points history to operate the loyalty program.
• Your data is used only to deliver points, rewards, and service updates.
• We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
• You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time.
• Data is stored securely and access is restricted to authorised staff.
consent.termsBody:
• Membership is free and open to customers of Sirichai Pharmacy.
• Points are earned at 1 point per 10 THB of qualifying purchases.
• Points and rewards have no cash value and cannot be transferred.
• We reserve the right to adjust the program with reasonable notice.
• Accounts found misusing the program may be suspended.
consent.socialNotice: Continuing with LINE or Google may share your email address with us to create or link your account.
consent.forgotNotice: Your email address will be used only to send a one-time password reset code.
